# Changelog

## HVD 2.0 restructure

- Restructured the original HCP Vault Radar guidance into the HVD 2.0 guide model. Operator content — people and process, identity and access management, data source onboarding, agent deployment, and observability and alert management — now forms this Administration Guide. Consumer content moved to the [User Guide](/validated-designs/vault-radar/user-guide/introduction).
- As a fully-managed SaaS product, Vault Radar has no Installation Guide; backup, disaster recovery, upgrade, and sizing sections are handled by HashiCorp and are not applicable.

### Authoring backlog

The following canonical Administration Guide sections are not yet authored for Vault Radar and are tracked for future contributions: Consumer onboarding (as a standalone runbook), Audit log export, and Support readiness.
